entries.title: ios + titang + pepper!
entries.caption: we bought your phone and we saw peppar on the way to pet express! then we ate jb and titang paid for our matcha w oreo mcflurry HEHEHE.

entries.title: chapagetti + stir fry ramen + massage
entries.caption: date dito sa bahay! we cooked noodles, you massaged me, we made love, slept a lot, played, and we took a lot of photos :D

entries.title: espana walks w mandi n nc + 24chix
entries.caption: the day before this, la us pic but we ate kfc with those 2 as well HEHE. i like their presence :D

entries.title: mcdo after your antips date w friends
entries.caption: you always look so good sa dress mo na ito. this colour suits you very well and yo are always so pretty to me. i love you so much :D

entries.title: moa + sleepover!
entries.caption: sobrang full ng heart ko nito, love. as in. first, bus to get there, so comfy! nag makeup din tayo nun so iz so fun nga HEHE. next, lakad + tom's world photobooth! this was a very memorable moment din kasi a bit after nito, i played bball and i got you chippy :D then we ate tff, v good but no water, tapos the eye! my goodness. tapos tiktok and fireworks baby! tapos barn stormer EHEHEHEHHE TAPOS DROP TOWER ANO B YN !!! then jb n 711 pauwi. of course, yung nangyari after nito, alam mo na HEHEHE i love you so much, baby.

entries.title: i want to see you so i came :D
entries.caption: hinatid ko kayo sa araneta :D i ate lunch na luto ni titang first and nagplay w butter and peppar. after nun, nagtupi me clothes mo and watched tita braid you HEHEHE tapos yas ayun lang. :D i am so glad you enjoyed the concert :D

entries.title: my house date :D
entries.caption: nanood tayo grey's for 10 mins, nag cuddles, and made love. mhmm. tapos after ng very hot sesbian lex ay nag ala bff kung makipag apiran, haixt.

entries.title: date w you and steve (jhannen dis time)
entries.caption: nag codm, bumili buldak, nanood demon slayer, at umuwi na. FUN DAY pero i needed more cuddles w you :'(

entries.title: me house date ulit! :DDD
entries.caption: salamat sa flowers. love. i really appreciate it :D bili muna tuna mayo ingredients sa dali tapos nanood tayo grey's HEHEHEH veryyy fun. so yummy ng tuna mayo, it was my first time creating n eating one. tapos natologatnaganek.

entries.title: omg senri
entries.caption: we waited for senri but we werent able to see her again. tapos we ate chicken poppers sa parking ng itech, tbh, that made my heart very full :D tapos u waited gang dumating si sir bago ka umuwi :D

entries.title: BDAY CELEB !!!
entries.caption: me nag ayos MWHEEUHEUHEE then dami kanta and food and hinatid nicole and laro w mattbry then eep time n wake up sex and play cards w butter n peppar and nood meet greet bye n eep and ligo n para umuwi haixt,,, nag la cafe us bago umuwi nang tuluyan whahah

entries.title: loe butter n peppar
entries.caption: sobrang ganda mo doon sa pic sa taas and sobrang kolit ko rin e no XDDD tamo nmn kalaro mga posa

entries.title: bebe waited w me again :D
entries.caption: hehe, jana dorm dis tapos after class ninyo ay bumalik ka sa itech HEHEHE YEHEYYY tapos we waited :DDD i love you so much and i appreciate these things a lot :D

entries.title: bday nicole this!
entries.caption: hbd nicole, hi koken n matt n uriel hehehe. this day was so fun for me and your friends are always fun to be with. i can imagine how happy you were noong jhs and shs cuz you were surrounded by these people. sobranggg happy ng heart ko knowing you didnt have a rough teen years :D i am also glad i get to hangout w them and i dont think they hate me being around so that's great :D

entries.title: nakasingit na naman ng overnight ang dalawa XDDD
entries.caption: i hope your parents dont mind these overnights too much and i hope im being a great person to be around for them. i dont want to always please them BUT i do want them to know that i respect them,, pero i hope they don mind these accidental overnights too much HEHEHEH i love you baby and i think your parents are great people :D
